    devel/g-golf: update to 0.8.0-a.5

    Summary of changes:
        - Templates
        - Derived class improvements
        - SXML support
        - Emacs experimental addon sxml-ui.el (in examples/adw-1/adw1-demo/ui)
        - Adwaita demo
        - Bug fixes

    Full changes: https://www.gnu.org/software/g-golf/news.html

    PR:             273493
